message:
feat(dashboard): attention panel cursor retention, mail signals, stats badges, zoom propagation

Major attention panel and dashboard integration improvements:

Attention fetch rework (commands.go, commands_test.go):
- Use PeekAttentionFeed() instead of GetAttentionFeed()
- Replay full journal, derive agent name from paneAgents map before
  falling back to details["agent_type"]
- Sort with sort.SliceStable, trim to attentionPanelMaxItems (10)
  with cursor retention logic via trimAttentionItems()
- Extract parseAttentionTimestamp() (RFC3339Nano then RFC3339 fallback)
- Sort tiebreaker: equal timestamps broken by cursor value
- Tests: feed unavailable, sort+limit, top-ten newest, cursor retention

Attention panel (panels/attention.go, attention_test.go):
- SetData() now sorts internally using attentionItemLess()
- SelectCursor(cursor) for exact match, SelectNearestCursor(cursor)
  for closest surviving item (prefers newer on tie)
- Panel header includes warning icon
- Tests: exact/nearest cursor selection, sort ordering

Dashboard model (dashboard.go):
- New fields: requestedAttentionCursor, attentionCursorApplied,
  seenMailAttentionIDs
- requestAttentionCursor() / applyRequestedAttentionCursor() for
  auto-focus on specific attention items with fallback messaging
- Mail attention signals: MailInboxUpdateMsg emits PublishMailPending
  or PublishMailAckRequired (deduplicated via seenMailAttentionIDs)
- handleAttentionZoom propagates selected item cursor through overlay
  zoom hint and webhook event
- renderAttentionBadge() for non-popup mode (red action_required,
  yellow interesting counts); overlay badge reflects attention state
- Help bar shows contextual "Tab -> attention!" hint
- New() seeds fetchingAttention=true and lastAttentionFetch to prevent
  initial re-fetch race

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
